result:
I'll repair the JSON syntax error and check the logical structure.

The draft has a malformed JSON structure in the clauses array. The issue is in the second `CAN` operator—the `restrictedBy` clause inside the `stimulus` SP is missing a closing brace for the `BE-SPEC` predicate.

Let me fix this and also reconsider the frame choice. "Littleness" is a property/quality, so `WhenTrue` (property frame) is more appropriate than `InstanceSchema`. The frame-implicit referent 1 will be the thing that has the property.

```json
{"kind":"explication","gloss":"the quality of being small in size or extent.","record":{"schema":"kot-ast/1","frame":"WhenTrue","referents":[],"clauses":[{"type":"pred","pred":"BE-SPEC","roles":{"undergoer":{"kind":"ref","index":1},"attribute":{"kind":"sp","head":{"kind":"primeHead","prime":"SMALL"}}}}]}}
```
